name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
description: Anthropic API key for authentication

name: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
description: Custom base URL for Anthropic API (e.g. local proxy)

name: ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN
description: Bearer token for custom auth header

name: CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX
description: Use Google Cloud Vertex AI instead of Anthropic API

name: ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID
description: Google Cloud project ID for Vertex AI

name: CLOUD_ML_REGION
description: Google Cloud region for Vertex AI

name: CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK
description: Use AWS Bedrock instead of Anthropic API

name: AWS_REGION
description: AWS region for Bedrock

name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
description: AWS access key ID for Bedrock auth

name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
description: AWS secret access key for Bedrock auth

name: AWS_SESSION_TOKEN
description: AWS session token for Bedrock auth

name: HTTP_PROXY
description: HTTP proxy URL

name: HTTPS_PROXY
description: HTTPS proxy URL

name: NO_PROXY
description: Comma-separated hosts to bypass proxy

name: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
description: Max output tokens for Claude responses

name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC
description: Disable telemetry and version checks

name: ANTHROPIC_MODEL
description: Override default Claude model

name: ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL
description: Override background task model

name: BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS
description: Default bash command timeout in milliseconds

name: BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS
description: Maximum bash command timeout in milliseconds

name: BASH_MAX_OUTPUT_LENGTH
description: Max characters of bash output before truncation

name: CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_HELPER_TTL_MS
description: TTL for API key helper cache

name: CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH
description: Skip Bedrock auth validation

name: CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_VERTEX_AUTH
description: Skip Vertex auth validation

name: MCP_TIMEOUT
description: Timeout in ms for MCP server startup

name: MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT
description: Timeout in ms for individual MCP tool calls
